title: Init npm project + Vite + CRXJS build tooling
details: package.json, vite.config with @crxjs/vite-plugin (fallback: esbuild script if CRXJS blocks). Output dist/ loadable unpacked. Add npm scripts: dev, build. Node 20+.

title: Write manifest.json (MV3, minimal permissions)
details: MV3. permissions: storage, contextMenus, scripting, activeTab. host_permissions: [] . default_locale: en. name/description via __MSG_ext_name__/__MSG_ext_description__. Placeholder icons. See SPEC §3 §7.

title: Scaffold 4 contexts: service worker, content script, popup, options
details: background/service-worker.js, content/main.js, popup/, options/ — each just logs a heartbeat and (for content) responds to a PING message from the worker. Verify message round-trip works.

title: Scaffold _locales for en, zh_CN, ms, ja, vi, ko
details: messages.json per locale with ext_name + ext_description. English text as placeholder in non-en files is OK at this stage. See SPEC §8 key conventions.

title: Lint/format config + CI workflow
details: ESLint + Prettier. GitHub Actions: install, lint, build on every PR. Fail on lint errors.

title: Selection detector in content script
details: Port REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §1 selection detector: mouseup+touchend debounced 250ms, selectionchange clears state, ignore <2 chars or collapsed, capture bounding rect. Emit internal event {text, rect}.

title: Shadow DOM UI host + trigger icon
details: One host element appended to documentElement, attachShadow, CSS reset inside. Floating icon appears near selection end on selection event; disappears on selection collapse/scroll. Must not steal focus or break copy.

title: Translation modal box (anchored) + dismissal
details: Click icon → modal anchored to selection rect (flip if near viewport edge). Shows source text + loading state + result area + Explain button (hidden for now). Dismiss: Esc, outside mousedown, × button. Port positioning from REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §7.

title: Mobile bottom-sheet variant + drag-to-dismiss
details: Viewport <640px: modal renders as bottom sheet, drag handle to dismiss (REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §7).

title: Context capture: surrounding paragraph
details: Walk up from selection commonAncestorContainer, take innerText, truncate ~1200 chars (REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §2). Sent along with translate request; needed later by Explain.

title: Message protocol + mock translator in service worker
details: Define TRANSLATE/EXPLAIN request+response message shapes (documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md). Service worker answers TRANSLATE with a mock (reversed text + 500ms delay) so E2 UX is testable without any API.

title: E2 exit-criteria test pass on 10 real sites
details: Manual QA checklist: news site, GitHub, MDN, Wikipedia, Twitter/X, Gmail, a React SPA, a strict-CSP site, an iframe-heavy site, one RTL page. Record findings in docs/qa/e2-checklist.md.

title: Engine adapter interface + registry
details: interface: translate(text, targetLang, opts) / explain(...) / capabilities() / isAvailable(). Registry picks active engine from settings. All in service worker. See docs/ENGINES.md.

title: Trial gateway adapter (REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §3)
details: Port REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §3: XOR decryptKey (seed 20260515) + SSE streaming parse for /v1/responses, model gpt-5.4-mini, reasoning.effort low. Bundled cipher string only — plaintext key NEVER in repo. AbortSignal timeout 30s.

title: Chrome on-device Translator adapter
details: Feature-detect Translator + LanguageDetector APIs (Chrome 138+). Handle model-download progress state. capabilities(): translate only, no explain. Graceful unavailable state.

title: BYOK adapter #1: Gemini
details: generateContent REST with user key from chrome.storage.local. Then clone pattern for OpenAI (T-017) and DeepSeek (T-018).

title: BYOK adapter #2: OpenAI
details: chat.completions or responses API with user key.

title: BYOK adapter #3: DeepSeek
details: OpenAI-compatible endpoint with user key.

title: Options page: engine, keys, target language, UI language
details: Engine picker, per-provider key fields (masked, stored chrome.storage.local), target-language default, UI-language note. All strings via chrome.i18n.

title: IndexedDB translation cache in service worker
details: Key: v{PROMPT_VERSION}::{targetLang}::{engine}::{sha256(text) short}. LRU cap. Version-bump invalidation per REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §6. See SPEC §6.

title: Probe live gateway quota-error shape + central error mapper
details: Deliberately exhaust/simulate daily limit against gpt.yapweijun1996.com; document exact status/body in docs/ENGINES.md. Build error mapper (port llm-error.js idea): network/auth/quota/model → friendly message codes incl. trial_quota_exhausted.

title: Trial-quota BYOK upsell UI
details: On trial_quota_exhausted: modal shows upsell (set up own key → opens options; try again tomorrow; on-device fallback if available). BYOK users' own quota errors show normal message, NOT upsell. See SPEC §4 §9.

title: Wire real engines into modal (replace mock)
details: Modal translate path uses active engine + cache. Streaming: render tokens incrementally when engine supports SSE.

title: Explain prompt + strict-JSON schema + loose parser
details: Port REFERENCE-SNIPPETS §5: schemaVersion, buildPrompt (CEFR-graded examples, simpler-vocab rule), parseJsonLoose fallback. LLM engines only.

title: Explain rendering in modal
details: Render explain payload: headword + POS/CEFR badges, dual-language definitions, graded examples, collapsible collocations/word-family/synonyms/antonyms/memory-tip. Escape all HTML.

title: Explain cache + engine-capability gating
details: Cache key: explain::v{SCHEMA_VERSION}::{origin}::{normalized phrase}::{targetLang}. Hide/disable Explain button when active engine lacks explain capability, with i18n hint.

title: i18n completeness: translate all 6 locales for real
details: Replace all English placeholders in zh_CN, ms, ja, vi, ko. Native-speaker or high-quality LLM translation + human review.

title: CI i18n check: no hardcoded strings, no missing keys
details: Script: every getMessage key exists in all 6 messages.json; grep heuristic for hardcoded UI literals in content/popup/options. Wire into CI.

title: Context menu: Translate selection
details: contextMenus entry (i18n title) → same pipeline as icon click.

title: Icons + branding
details: 16/32/48/128 px extension icons, trigger-icon glyph, consistent palette. Update manifest.

title: Privacy policy + Web Store listing (6 locales)
details: State exactly what text is sent to which engine and when; zero-retention claims only where true. Store listing copy in all 6 languages.

title: MVP end-to-end QA + store submission
details: Run ROADMAP v0.x exit criteria: fresh install → translate on 10 sites → hit trial quota → switch to BYOK → explain works. Fix blockers, submit to Chrome Web Store.
